title: Kitchen Utensils Set with Holder & Drip Pad | Silicone Cooking Utensil 8pc Set | Silicone Spatula, Spoon, Spaghetti Server, Ladle | Scratch Proof Non-Stick Kitchen Gadgets & Tools
features: ★ 8pc Kitchen Utensils Set – This 8-piece kitchen set includes; Spaghetti server, deep soup style ladle, Slotted spatula/turner, solid spatula/turner, solid spoon and slotted spoon, drip pad and a storage holder bucket. Quality utensils, ideal set to meet your kitchen organisation needs.

★ Silicone Utensil Holder & Drip Tray – Included in the set is a matching storage basket holder and sleek black design drip tray pad. Easy to clean and keep your kitchen looking sharp and tidy. The utensils and accessories are also food safe.

★ High Quality Silicone Utensils - Our Non-stick Cooking Utensils have stainless steel shafts with silicone heads that can withstand high temperatures up to 446°F/230°. You do not have to worry about them melting. These won’t chip, warp or melt like your old plastic kitchen utensils set.

★ Easy to use, Easy to clean - This quality silicone kitchen utensils set is easy to wash, simply wipe after use under hot water or put in your dishwasher. See images for individual product shapes and sizes. The utensils also have a hanging hole design.

★ Scratch proof, Non-stick Cookware - Scratch proof silicone heads keep the surface from being scratched or dented and helps to extend the service life of all kitchen pans. The wooden handle is ergonomically designed which is very comfortable to use. Hanging holes on the handle for easy storage.
